title: Mumbai’s 14-lane mega Virar–Alibaug corridor gets Cabinet green light — Phase 1 approved at Rs 31,793 crore
summary: Maharashtra cleared administrative approval for the first phase of the Virar–Alibaug Multi-Modal Transport Corridor (126 km), linking JNPA, Navi Mumbai International Airport and the Mumbai Trans Harbour Link; MSRDC will execute a 96.41 km Vasai-to-Pen stretch on DBFOT with nine interchanges and digital tolling.

title: CIDCO unveils ₹16,250 crore Budget for FY27 — focus on airport, metro and housing
summary: CIDCO's budget pushes infrastructure development, regional connectivity and affordable housing in Navi Mumbai, projecting receipts of ₹16,250 cr against ₹16,150 cr expenditure.

title: CIDCO plans 120-acre commercial hub in Navi Mumbai — tender floated for 20-year development
summary: CIDCO has invited bids to develop a 120-acre International Corporate Park in Kharghar, envisioned as a new BKC-style business district to attract corporations, financial institutions and mixed-use developments.

title: Navi Mumbai to get its own BKC — CIDCO floats bids for International Corporate Park in Kharghar
summary: A 100+ acre International Corporate Park 14 km from the new Navi Mumbai International Airport, designed to attract large corporations and financial institutions over a 20-year phased development.

title: Navi Mumbai Office Boom — Airport drives demand and challenges Mumbai
summary: Office demand is shifting fast to Kharghar and Panvel. Rents at ₹75–80/sq ft are far below BKC, with 12.3 mn sq ft of office space under construction across the corridor.
